title: Tangy Toasted Uruguayan Water Chestnut Empanadas
description: Crispy empanadas filled with a tangy water chestnut mixture, perfect for a date night, featuring a mother sauce base and ayurvedic tamasic friendly ingredients, with a bitter taste balanced by the sweetness of the chestnuts.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the water chestnuts, mother sauce, olive oil, salt, black pepper, and turmeric.
Lay an empanada wrapper on a flat surface and place a tablespoon of the water chestnut mixture in the center.
Fold the empanada wrapper in half and press the edges together to seal the empanada.
Repeat the process with the remaining empanada wrappers and filling.
Place the empanadas on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with a little bit of olive oil.
Bake the empanadas in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
